name: Survival RPG 2: The Temple Ruins
short_description: A magical artifact lying among the ruins of a lost temple? Embark on a journey full of adventure, quests and exploration. You will need your survival skills in this retro 2d pixel art universe. Survival RPG 2: The Temple Ruins is the sequel of the first retro game Survival RPG: The Lost Treasure.
detailed_description:
A magical artifact? Lying among the ruins of a lost temple in the jungle? Sounds too good to miss this opportunity!

WHAT AWAITS YOU

Survival RPG 2: The Temple Ruins is the sequel to the first retro game Survival RPG: The Lost Treasure. It combines quests, exploration, crafting and survival in a retro 2D pixel art universe. In this new adventure, your journey will take you to distant and strange worlds to discover mysterious temples lost in the jungle.

NO ORDINARY TREASURE HUNT

Are you ready for this magical treasure hunt? To succeed, you will need to explore different lands: dangerous deserts, threatening jungles and forests, dark dungeons and caves. They are home to terrible monsters that you will have to defeat. Craft tools, weapons and armors along the way to help you fight them.

LET THE MAGIC BEGIN!

Let yourself be carried away in this wonderful world filled with mysteries! You will meet characters who will help you complete quests, solve puzzles and find the magical artifact.

FULL LIST OF FEATURES

- 7 story chapters that will bring you to the artifact.
- Exploration of more than 30 dungeons, caverns, jungles, ships, temples and huts.
- More than 180 items to collect, mine and craft.
- Multiple roleplay quests and characters to help you in your journey.
- 70 crafting recipes that you will unlock during your adventure and exploration.
- Craft tools to help you.
- Discover hidden items.
- Find hidden treasures with treasure maps.
- Fight more than 35 different monsters and bosses.
